title: neva_district_rows.jsonl — district→figures table row
description: One district table row extracted deterministically from a NeVA answer. figures carries every numeric token on the row in print order; column semantics (permits vs seizures vs revenue) are the consumer's interpretation, not this layer's. A row exists only where the district name matched the clean gazetteer verbatim on that line (a corrupted name never matches); quality carries the document-level text-layer verdict so consumers can filter harder.
